name: Vegetable Platter- Dia Rau Song
recipeIngredient: 1 large head of Boston or other soft lettuce, separated into individual leaves
1 bunch of scallions, cut into 2-inch lengths
1 cup fresh Asian or regular basil leaves
1 cucumber, peeled and sliced into alternating strips, then halved lengthwise and thinly sliced crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. On a large platter, decoratively arrange all of the ingredients in separate groups.
2. Use in recipes where required.
